data.title: Houston area home prices decreased by 2.0% in August, as per First American Data & Analytics report.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), unveiled its August 2025 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report provides property-centric data, risk management, and valuation solutions nationally, tracking home price variations at national, state, and metropolitan levels, including Core-Based Statistical Areas. The report offers insights into metropolitan price tiers. It is essential for real estate investors and professionals as it presents data that is nearly up-to-date, less than four weeks behind real time.

data.title: LOXAM renews agreement with GTT to connect and secure 115 sites in seven European countries, enhancing customer experience.
data.description: GTT Communications Inc., a prominent provider of networking and security services for global companies, recently shared that LOXAM, the top equipment rental firm in Europe, has decided to renew and expand their partnership with GTT. The agreement includes connecting and safeguarding 115 facilities across various European countries such as Belgium, Denmark, Germany, Ireland, Luxemburg, the Netherlands, and Switzerland. The enhanced network and security solution provided by GTT will notably increase bandwidth capabilities at LOXAM's branches, ensuring a more efficient and secure operational environment.

data.title: August 2025: National House Price Growth Slows, Buyers Get Chance. First American Data & Analytics report shows trend.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), unveiled its August 2025 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report, which provides property-centric data, risk management, and valuation solutions, offers insights into home price changes nationally, at state levels, and within metropolitan areas (Core-Based Statistical Areas). The data, released less than four weeks behind real-time, includes information on metropolitan price tiers.

data.title: MACH Alliance unveils MACH Architect Certification program for composable enterprise architecture, meeting demand for skilled professionals.
data.description: The MACH Alliance, a leading authority on composable enterprise architecture, unveiled the MACH Architect Certification program in New York. The certification aims to meet the increasing demand for MACH-aligned skills in enterprise transformation as businesses focus on agility, scalability, and quick market entry. The program provides full, open access to certified composable experts, recognizing the growing adoption of MACH in the AI-era. This initiative offers organizations a way to identify and develop skilled professionals in line with industry standards. The certification program is now available for interested candidates.

data.title: Brokers Daryn Fillis and Erik Gascho join NEO Home Loans powered by Better for transparency & control in home financing.
data.description: In New York, NEO Home Loans powered by Better, a mortgage lender known for its blend of expert loan advisors and cutting-edge technology to revolutionize the home financing process, has welcomed brokers Daryn Fillis and Erik Gascho to their team. Both Fillis and Gascho, with a history of establishing thriving ventures in the broker channel, were in pursuit of a model that offered genuine transparency, control, and collaboration - qualities often lacking in their previous experiences. This move highlights NEO Home Loans' commitment to expanding their team with accomplished professionals.

data.title: Amrize launches MV Tamarack carrier with 10,000+ cubic meters of cement for better distribution network.
data.description: Amrize (NYSE: AMRZ) marked the debut of MV Tamarack in Toronto today. This cutting-edge carrier boasts a massive capacity exceeding 10,000 cubic meters of cement. Fitted with advanced technology, the vessel will streamline the delivery of Amrize building materials, bolstering the efficiency and dependability of its distribution and logistics network. The introduction of Tamarack signifies a pivotal moment for Amrize as they cater to the escalating demands of the construction sector.

data.title: RLJ Lodging Trust appoints Nikhil Bhalla as Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately. Nikhil joined the company in 2015 and has shown leadership in various roles.
data.description: RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE: RLJ) based in Bethesda, Md. has appointed Nikhil Bhalla as its Chief Financial Officer. Bhalla, who has been with the company since 2015, previously held roles such as Senior Vice President of Finance and Treasurer. His promotion to CFO is effective immediately. During his time with RLJ, Bhalla has shown strong leadership in corporate strategy, treasury management, and investor relations.

data.title: Dallas-Plano-Irving home prices down 1.3% YoY in August according to First American Data & Analytics report.
data.description: First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), headquartered in Santa Ana, California, has unveiled its August 2025 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report, providing property-centric data, risk management, and valuation solutions, monitors home price fluctuations nationally, as well as at the state and metropolitan levels, including Core-Based Statistical Areas. The data in the report is nearly current, with updates tracking changes under four weeks.

data.title: Global AI chips market report 2026-2036 includes competitive analysis of 147+ companies. 75 startups raised over $2 billion in Q1 2025, with over $400M in optical communications and data center infrastructure.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Global AI Chips Market 2026-2036" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The AI chip market worldwide is witnessing remarkable growth in the year 2025. The initial quarter of 2025 showcased the market's strong performance, as 75 startups raised a total of more than $2 billion. Particularly, AI chips and related technologies have emerged as big winners during this period, with firms focusing on optical communications technology for chips and data center infrastructure attracting over $400 million in investments.

data.title: 19th Annual Stand Up for Heroes presented by Bob Woodruff Foundation and NYCF returns to NYC on Nov 10th at Lincoln Center. Featuring top comedians, musicians, and Broadway stars.
data.description: In New York City, Stand Up for Heroes, a night of hope and laughter, will be back for its 19th year at David Geffen Hall on November 10th, part of the Nov 7-16 New York Comedy Festival. The event, presented by the Bob Woodruff Foundation, will showcase top comedians, musicians, and Broadway stars like Mike Birbiglia, Alex Edelman, and Jim Gaffigan. This highly anticipated evening aims to raise funds for veterans and their families and is a key event during the festival.

data.title: RippleMatch introduces AI-Talent Marketplace in NYC, replacing resumes with verified skills to modernize early-career hiring.
data.description: In New York, RippleMatch has introduced an AI-Talent Marketplace that eliminates the need for resumes by focusing on verified skills, streamlining early-career hiring processes. This innovation aims to facilitate quicker and more efficient hiring by leveraging artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: Lucet launches Lucet™ at Home, merging with Emcara Health to revolutionize care delivery with compassion and innovation.
data.description: Two healthcare companies, Lucet and Emcara Health, have merged to form a single brand with a shared goal of providing compassionate and innovative care. This union aims to have a significant impact on the healthcare industry by combining resources and expertise. The new brand will operate under the name Lucet, with headquarters in Overland Park, Kansas. This collaboration will bring together a combined workforce of over 500 employees dedicated to delivering high-quality care to patients. The merger is expected to enhance services and drive growth for the brand as it strives to make a difference in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Deep Fission plans nuclear projects in Texas, Utah, and Kansas; signs LOIs with partners, placing reactors 1 mile underground.
data.description: Deep Fission, Inc., a cutting-edge nuclear energy company, revealed its initial three designated sites for small modular pressurized water reactors to be placed one mile below the ground. The chosen locations are in Texas, Utah, and Kansas. Deep Fission has inked Letters of Intent (LOIs) with local partners for collaborative development ventures at each site, showcasing its dedication to implementing established nuclear technology.

data.title: Qventus introduces AI Solution Factory at QLive to develop AI Operational Assistants for health systems, emphasizing ROI.
data.description: Qventus, a prominent provider of AI-driven solutions for healthcare facilities, revealed the launch of the AI Solution Factory at their client conference, QLive, held in New York. This innovation enables hospitals to collaborate in developing AI Operational Assistants that address critical issues, focusing on delivering long-term ROI. During the event, Qventus shared its latest client outcomes and announced new partnerships.

data.title: Render Networks integrates Trimble's high-accuracy GNSS for real-time location data in Denver.
data.description: In Denver, Render Networks has incorporated Trimble’s highly precise Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) technology into its operations to provide up-to-the-minute location data. This integration aims to enhance the accuracy and efficiency of Render Networks' services.

data.title: FLOKI's price jumps by 5.33% with mixed signals from technical indicators: RSI at 52.21 and bullish MACD. Trading opportunities arise.
data.description: FLOKI experienced a 5.33% increase in trading value, indicating potential opportunities for strategic traders. Technical analysis shows a neutral RSI at 52.21 and a bullish MACD momentum. These numbers suggest favorable conditions for those looking to make informed trading decisions.

data.title: CFP Board sets 6 public policy priorities to raise financial planning standards and protect consumers.
data.description: In Washington, the CFP Board unveiled six crucial public policy goals aimed at enhancing the financial planning sector, increasing the availability of reliable and ethical financial guidance, and safeguarding the public. As the leading entity for setting industry standards, the CFP Board is focusing on initiatives to elevate criteria, create more avenues for professionals, and ensure consumer protection. Against a backdrop of mounting financial intricacy and unpredictability for Americans, the Board is committed to these objectives.
